yahoo.descriptionHtml:
Player / coach in all areas across Yahoo Search:
from the mobile app to modernizing Yahoo Search
to a net new product Scout.

asana.title: Asana
asana.description: Nico shipped Timeline, Calendar, and the section-based hierarchy that reshaped how work appears in Asana. Nico also led a small design team as a player-coach while staying hands-on in core workflows.

figma.title: Figma
figma.description: Nico was Lead Product Designer on Figma's collaboration pillar, including Spotlight, commenting, annotations, and Dev Mode. Systems and interaction craft kept complex flows trustworthy at Figma scale.

payitoff.title: Payitoff
payitoff.description: Nico co-founded Payitoff and was Founding Designer on a debt platform focused on student loans, later acquired by Array. The product paired clear UX with infrastructure thinking so people could understand and reduce their debt.

management.title: Management
management.description: Nico's management work centers on expectations, critique, growth, and cross-functional alignment across design orgs. This preview highlights leadership themes from Yahoo, Asana, and earlier roles.
